calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Irene Tofft, CSR#12913.
Petitioner Qunzhen Li, mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Qunzhen Li sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Xue Hong Xie.
Proof of Publication on file.
Declaration re: consent by other parent on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Wenjie Liang to Thomas Wenjie Liang.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
